title: Emerged From the Obelisk
summary: Your body, hard as crystal, gives you a suite of unique abilities, gained after an interaction with a floating crystalline obelisk.
tiers: Tier 6: Resonant Quake or Return to the Obelisk
gm_intrusions: Cyphers and artifacts react unexpectedly in the character’s hands.
text: Your body, hard as crystal, gives you a suite of unique abilities, gained after an interaction with a floating crystalline obelisk.
details: Your body, hard as crystal, gives you a suite of unique abilities, gained after an interaction with a floating crystalline obelisk.
